title: Mellow Roasted Portuguese Lamb Roast
description: A shaggy, roasted Portuguese dish featuring Wensleydale cheese and caramelized flavors, suitable for a diabetic-friendly date night dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb roast with salt, black pepper, and chopped rosemary.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb roast until browned on all sides, then set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the pitted dates, crumbly Wensleydale cheese, and lemon juice to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the lamb roast to the pot and spoon some of the date and cheese mixture over the top.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the lamb for 2.5 hours, or until the internal temperature reaches 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the lamb rest for 15 minutes before slicing and serving.
